steps.title: Complete the question
steps.content: The sentence says the novel asks a central question, then introduces that question after the colon. The completion must therefore use question form: subject-verb inversion after "How" and a question mark at the end.

steps.title: Check form and punctuation
steps.content: A and C keep statement word order, so they do not form a standard question. B has the needed inversion but ends with a period. The remaining choice has both inversion and question punctuation. The answer is D.
